CustomField.description: Incentive weightage for this criteria. Used to split total incentive across multiple KPIs. Blank = no weighting (independent calculation).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Percentage weight this criteria contributes to the total incentive pool. Example: Revenue=60%, S&D Parameter=15%, Focus Brand=10%, Collection=15%. All weights across criteria should sum to 100%. If left blank, no weighting is applied and each criteria is calculated independently.
CustomField.label: Incentive Weight (%)
